Fix the login timeout so that users stay signed in for 24h, verified by an
end-to-end browser run that logs in, waits, and confirms the session persists;
the auth test suite (npm test auth) must stay green. Read src/auth/session.ts.
Never weaken or delete existing auth tests. Done: the session persists in the
real browser run and npm test auth passes with no related regression. Stop and
ask if the fix would touch token signing, billing, or production config.
